author: LinOnetwo
description: Modern link hover preview with glass effect
text:
{"tiddlers":{"$:/plugins/linonetwo/preview-glass/changelog":{"title":"$:/plugins/linonetwo/preview-glass/changelog","created":"20260120000000000","modified":"20260120000000000","type":"text/vnd.tiddlywiki","text":"!!! v1.0.0 (2026-01-20) Complete rewrite of the preview plugin. Breaking changes: * Removed dependencies on `tobibeer/appear` and `ooktech/dynamic-tables` * Requires TiddlyWiki 5.2.0 or later * Simplified configuration options Technical improvements: * Replaced widget hijacking with lightweight startup module * Uses standard Reveal widget and PageTemplate * Integrated with TiddlyWiki palette system for theme compatibility * Modern CSS with backdrop-filter glass effect and smooth animations * Document-level event delegation for better performance * 150ms hover delay to avoid accidental triggers File changes: * Added: `startup.js`, `page-template.tid`, `palette-styles.tid` * Modified: all style and template files * Removed: `link.js`, `keyboard.js`, `popups.tid` Migration: Upgrading from 0.6.0 should work automatically. Custom templates remain compatible. --- !!! v0.6.0 (2020-04-14) * Fork of tobibeer/preview plugin * Added auto-close on mouse leave * Added glass effect styling"},"$:/plugins/linonetwo/preview-glass/config":{"title":"$:/plugins/linonetwo/preview-glass/config","caption":"Preview Glass Configuration","text":"\define config-option()
<$transclude tiddler="$:/plugins/linonetwo/preview-glass/lingo/$(option)$" mode="inline"/>
<$list filter="[[$(option)$]prefix[exclude-]]" variable="null"> <$checkbox tiddler="$:/plugins/linonetwo/preview-glass/defaults/$(option)$" field="text" checked="yes" unchecked="no" default="yes" > Enable <$list filter="[[$(option)$]prefix[template]]" variable="null"> <$edit-text tag="input" tiddler="$:/plugins/linonetwo/preview-glass/defaults/$(option)$" default="$:/plugins/linonetwo/preview-glass/template" class="tc-edit-texteditor" />
\end

<$vars defaults="$:/plugins/linonetwo/preview-glass/defaults/"> <$list filter="[all[tiddlers+shadows]removeprefixsort[title]]" variable="option"> <>

get[x]addprefix[left:]addsuffix[px;]] [get[y]addprefix[top:]addsuffix[px;]] +[join[ ]] }}} >
{{!!title}} <$button class="tc-btn-invisible tc-preview-close" tooltip="Close preview"> <> {{$:/core/images/close-button}}
<$transclude tiddler={{{ [[$:/plugins/linonetwo/preview-glass/defaults/template]get[text]else[$:/plugins/linonetwo/preview-glass/template]] }}} mode="block" />
"},"$:/plugins/linonetwo/preview-glass/palette-styles":{"title":"$:/plugins/linonetwo/preview-glass/palette-styles","tags":"$:/tags/Stylesheet","type":"text/css","text":".tc-preview-popup{color:<>;border:1px solid;box-shadow:0 10px 40px <>}.tc-preview-header{border-bottom:1px solid}.tc-preview-title{color:<>}.tc-preview-content{color:<>}.tc-preview-excerpt{border-left:3px solid}.tc-preview-text::after{background:linear-gradient(to bottom,transparent,<>)}.tc-preview-plugin-info{color:<>}.tc-preview-fields tr{border-bottom:1px solid}.tc-preview-field-name{color:<>}.tc-preview-field-value{color:<>}"},"$:/plugins/linonetwo/preview-glass/preview-template.css":{"title":"$:/plugins/linonetwo/preview-glass/preview-template.css","text":".tc-preview-popup{position:fixed;pointer-events:auto;z-index:1000;max-width:500px;min-width:300px;max-height:600px;overflow:hidden;border-radius:12px;animation:.2s ease-out preview-fade-in;backdrop-filter:blur(20px) saturate(180%);-webkit-backdrop-filter:blur(20px) saturate(180%)}@keyframes preview-fade-in{from{opacity:0;transform:translateY(-10px) scale(.95)}to{opacity:1;transform:translateY(0) scale(1)}}.tc-preview-popup-inner{padding:16px;overflow-y:auto;max-height:600px}.tc-preview-header{display:flex;justify-content:space-between;align-items:center;margin-bottom:12px;padding-bottom:8px}.tc-preview-title{font-weight:600;font-size:1.1em;flex:1;overflow:hidden;text-overflow:ellipsis;white-space:nowrap}.tc-preview-close{flex-shrink:0;padding:4px;width:24px;height:24px;opacity:.6;transition:opacity .2s}.tc-preview-close:hover{opacity:1}.tc-preview-close svg{width:16px;height:16px}.tc-preview-content{line-height:1.5}.tc-preview-excerpt{margin-bottom:12px;padding:8px;border-radius:6px}.tc-preview-text{font-size:.95em;max-height:200px;overflow:hidden;position:relative}.tc-preview-text::after{content:"";position:absolute;bottom:0;left:0;right:0;height:40px}.tc-preview-info{margin:12px 0;font-size:.9em}.tc-preview-backlinks{padding:8px;border-radius:6px}.tc-preview-plugin-info{padding:8px;font-style:italic}.tc-preview-metadata{margin-top:12px;font-size:.85em}.tc-preview-fields{width:100%;border-collapse:collapse}.tc-preview-field-name{padding:4px 8px;font-weight:500;white-space:nowrap;width:80px}.tc-preview-field-value{padding:4px 8px}.tc-preview-popup-inner::-webkit-scrollbar{width:6px}.tc-preview-popup-inner::-webkit-scrollbar-track{border-radius:3px}.tc-preview-popup-inner::-webkit-scrollbar-thumb{border-radius:3px}","created":"20200415090452849","modified":"20200530033507747","tags":"$:/tags/Stylesheet","type":"text/css"},"$:/plugins/linonetwo/preview-glass/readme":{"title":"$:/plugins/linonetwo/preview-glass/readme","created":"20200414135748497","modified":"20260120000000000","type":"text/vnd.tiddlywiki","text":"!! About Link hover preview plugin with glass effect. Complete rewrite of [[tobibeer/preview|https://tobibeer.github.io/tw5-plugins/#preview]]. Shows popup on link hover with: * Content excerpt (first few lines) * Backlinks (requires inverse-link-and-folder plugin) * Metadata (modified, created, tags) !! Features * Glass effect with backdrop-filter * Adapts to all themes via TiddlyWiki palette system * Lightweight implementation using document-level event listeners * Positioned near cursor * Configurable exclusions for system/shadow/empty tiddlers * 150ms hover delay to avoid accidental triggers !! Optional Dependencies * [[$:/plugins/linonetwo/inverse-link-and-folder]] - for displaying backlinks !! Configuration Visit the [[config panel|$:/plugins/linonetwo/preview-glass/config]] to customize: * Preview content template * Exclusion rules (system/shadow/empty tiddlers) !! Implementation |!Component |!Description | |`startup.js` |Document-level event listener | |`page-template.tid` |Popup display using Reveal widget | |`template.tid` |Customizable preview content template | |`palette-styles.tid` |Palette-based color styles | |`preview-template.css` |Structural CSS | !! Comparison |!Aspect |!v0.6.0 |!v1.0.0 | |Implementation |Hijacks link widget |startup module + PageTemplate | |Dependencies |tobibeer/appear, dynamic-tables |None (inverse-link optional) | |Performance |Hijacks every link render |Event delegation | |Styling |Hardcoded colors |Palette system | |Maintainability |Complex JS |Clean JS + standard APIs | !! Changelog See [[changelog|$:/plugins/linonetwo/preview-glass/changelog]] for version history. !! Source https://github.com/linonetwo/tiddlywiki-plugins "},"$:/plugins/linonetwo/preview-glass/startup.js":{"title":"$:/plugins/linonetwo/preview-glass/startup.js","text":""use
